So, you will commonly hear people, whether they be the most successful people in life, whether they be the opinion of your mother or your neighbor or your fellow classmate or whoever you're talking to, you will hear people say in life that knowledge is power. And so we're going to write that down together really quick because there's something really critical about this that I want you guys to know. So they say knowledge is power. Okay, this is what you hear them say. This is what they tell you. Knowledge is power. I'm here to tell you that this is missing a word. Missing one word. I'm going to tell you what that word is. Since unfortunately we can't play a guessing game together, it is applied knowledge is power. If you do not have the ability to apply the knowledge in which you gather, you're gathering worthless data. It is illogical, impractical, and un-beneficial to yourself in every way just to collect information. Who in their right mind likes to hear from the guy who knows everything but hasn't done anything himself? Nobody. Who likes to talk to the girl that knows everything about everybody but hasn't bettered herself? Who wants to do anything in life with just gathering knowledge, thinking that it's power? That's not power. Applying the knowledge that you gather is power. Applying all of the books that I read is worthless to me if I don't apply the lessons that I learned. Going throughout life, hitting my head on walls, learning things the hard way, it is worthless to me if I learn the lessons and then do the exact same actions that I took to have to learn the exact same lessons again from not applying the knowledge that I gathered in order to generate power. It is easy to go through life and watch a video to get motivation. It is easy in life to pick up a book and say that you learned something. It is easy to talk and to chatter. It is hard. It is a tougher path. It is the higher route to go, if you will, to apply everything that you learned, not just some things, but everything that you learned because then you walked through life in a constantly aligned state where people perceive you as powerful because you apply the principles and the lessons in which you learn and bring into your life. People know they can see. You feel the power of applying the knowledge that you've gathered because it becomes visible as you're stacking your knowledge. I'll tell you one thing. There's the easiest way to differentiate somebody who knows something and doesn't apply it and somebody who applies something that they know. It's the difference in the things in which they can call forth. As far as the material items, I'm not talking cars, houses, I'm not talking anything other than all of the things that most people desire, powerful relationships, physically, mentally, spiritually aligned, constantly drawing in the material items that they want, never doing anything other than profiting and prospering. All of these people that live these constantly well-balanced, successful lives where they profit and prosper, all of them have one thing in common. They have applied the knowledge and it is visible that they've applied the knowledge. You talk to them and they are just an overflowing wealth of information. It is a constant in these people's lives to show what they're learning, not just to tell what they're learning. You can tell in a story as an example, if somebody's just saying, hey, I read a book and this is what I learned from it, you would rather hear, hey, I read a book, this is what I learned from it and this is a story how I applied that information. This is how I learned that lesson myself after I read it. You want to go through life and you want to be able to cut up the naysayers because if you surround yourself with people who believe knowledge is power, you're going to surround yourself with people who don't take action and don't take a massive level of action, which is going to avoid, it's going to pull you, it's going to deteriorate, it's going to take away from you being able to profit and prosper because you need to be around people who are learning new things, who are asking you what you've learned and what you have applied into your day to day so you can actually obtain power. So make sure you apply everything that you learned.
